front.title: Operational Considerations for BFD Encapsulation in SRv6 Policy

abstract.t:
Bidirectional Forwarding Detection (BFD) mechanisms can be used for fast detection of failures in the forwarding path of SR Policy.
This document describes the Operational Guidance for BFD Encapsulation in SRv6 Policy.
The BFD packets may be encapsulated in Insert-mode or Encaps-mode.
